ci_notes: CI requires PostgreSQL 15; uses DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost/stream_closed_captioner_phoenix_test. Tests cannot run in workflow without DB service. Elixir 1.16.0 / OTP 26.0.
testing_framework: ExUnit with ExMachina factories, Mox for external mocks (Azure.MockCognitive, Twitch.MockHelix, Twitch.MockExtension), DataCase for DB, ConnCase for controllers, ChannelCase for channels

testing_backlog.title: CaptionSettingsLive.Index - LiveView event handler tests
testing_backlog.detail: stream_settings_live_test.exs was fully commented out. Revived with 7 tests: mount render, add/remove blocklist words, add/update translate language, form component save.

testing_backlog.title: services/twitch.ex
testing_backlog.detail: Large Twitch API service, no tests. Thin wrappers over behavior mocks; moderate test value. get_live_streams has non-trivial chunk/sort/dedup logic.

maintainer_priorities: None noted yet - no maintainer comments on test-related issues.

completed_prs.description: Added 2 tests for untested branches in CaptionsPipeline.Translations.maybe_translate/3.
Added 3 tests for pipeline_to(:default): passthrough, pirate mode, profanity filter.
Revived captions_channel_test.exs with 5 tests: join auth, unauthorized join, active event, default pipeline, twitch pipeline.
Revived stream_settings_live_test.exs with 7 LiveView tests for CaptionSettingsLive.Index event handlers.

notes: Factory: insert(:bits_balance_debit, user: user) to create active debit. User factory has stream_settings: build(:stream_settings), bits_balance: build(:bits_balance) by default. translate_languages is has_many - pass as list in insert(:user, translate_languages: [...]). mix format/lint not runnable without Elixir installed in workflow runner. No Zoom mock - pipeline_to(:zoom) calls HTTPoison directly; would need Bypass or new behavior. CaptionsChannel: async: false required (channel subprocess makes DB calls through ChannelCase sandbox). Factory pattern to avoid duplicate stream_settings: insert(:stream_settings, user: build(:user, stream_settings: nil)). CaptionSettingsLive: update_stream_settings safe in tests (test users have provider=nil, no eventsub records, no Twitch calls triggered). render_hook(view, event_name, params) cleanly triggers handle_event without DOM selector issues.

monthly_activity_issue.note: PR #243 merged (checked off by maintainer). New PR for caption settings live tests submitted 2026-03-08.
